accueil.intro1: Would you like to file a complaint, cancel one, or change the time of an appointment? You are in the right place!
accueil.intro2: Complete all these steps easily, in just a few clicks, without travelling.
accueil.intro3: This system allows victims to file a pre-complaint remotely, via the Internet, following an offence. This free service aims to make filing a complaint easier.
accueil.descriptionCarteDeclarer: Fill in the form to file a pre-complaint online quickly and easily.
accueil.descriptionCarteAnnuler: Would you like to cancel a complaint that has already been filed? Access the cancellation form.
accueil.descriptionCarteModifier: Easily change the date or time of your appointment online.

annulation.information: Please enter the appointment code received by email and SMS when creating your pre-complaint.

dialogueConfirmation.message: This action will cancel your appointment and delete your pre-complaint. This action is final. Do you confirm the withdrawal of this pre-complaint?

annulation.messageErreur: Unable to cancel the appointment. Please try again.
annulation.codeInexistant: No appointment matches this code. Please enter the appointment code shown in the confirmation email you received when filing your pre-complaint.
annulation.titrePersonnalise: Your cancellation request has been successfully recorded

modification.information: Please enter the appointment code received by email and SMS when creating your pre-complaint.
modification.codeInexistant: No appointment matches this code. Please enter the appointment code shown in the confirmation email you received when filing your pre-complaint.
modification.codeObligatoire: The appointment code is required and must contain at least 8 characters
modification.messageConfirmation: Your appointment is confirmed for {date} from {heureDebut} to {heureFin} – {lieu} police station (case {code}).
modification.messageErreur: Unable to change the appointment. Please try again.
modification.titrePersonnalise: Your change request has been successfully recorded

dialogueConfirmation.message: This action will change the date and time of your appointment. Do you confirm this change?

modification.erreurAucunCreneauSelectionne: Please select a time slot from the table

error.serverDown: Data temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
error.creneauIndisponible: No time slot available for the selected date.

apiErrors.erreurServeur: A technical error occurred on the server. Please try again in a few moments. If the problem persists, you can try again later or contact the police for assistance.
apiErrors.passerelle: The service is not responding correctly at the moment. Please try again in a few moments.
apiErrors.serviceIndisponible: The service is temporarily unavailable (maintenance or overload). Please try again later.
apiErrors.delaiDepasse: The request took too long to complete. Check your connection and try again.
apiErrors.nonTrouve: The requested resource could not be found. Check your information or try again.
apiErrors.accesRefuse: You are not authorized to perform this action.
apiErrors.tropDeRequetes: Too many attempts have been made. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
apiErrors.requeteInvalide: The request could not be processed. Check the information entered and try again.
apiErrors.generique: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

disclaimer.condition2: You wish to report damage caused by another vehicle
disclaimer.condition3: You have been the victim of carjacking (vehicle theft with violence or threats)
disclaimer.avantConfirmation: Before continuing, please confirm that your situation does not correspond to any of the cases mentioned above:
disclaimer.confirmeIdentite: I confirm that I do not know the identity of the person who committed the acts.
disclaimer.confirmeSituation: I confirm that my situation does not concern either carjacking or a road accident.

emailChallenge.codeInvalide: The verification code for your email address is invalid. Please enter the code received by email.
emailChallenge.codeExpire: The code has expired. Please request a new code.
emailChallenge.tropDeTentatives: Too many attempts. Please request a new code.
emailChallenge.erreurVerification: Unable to verify the code. Please try again.
emailChallenge.challengeIntrouvable: No active code request matches this session (page reload, different browser, or cleared data). Use “Resend a code” below to receive a new one at your email address, then enter it here.
emailChallenge.codeVerificationEnvoyeAdresse: Verification code sent to the address:
emailChallenge.etapeVerificationIntro: To secure your request, enter your email address, then click “Send a security code”. Enter the 6-digit code received by email to continue. If a code has already been sent for this session, you can enter it below; you will be able to request a new one after the indicated delay by clicking the button again.

rendezVous.warningVolVehiculePlaque: Based on the information in your declaration, your pre-complaint requires urgent processing. Please make an appointment within 24 hours at the latest. If no slot is available, we invite you to submit your pre-complaint and go to a police station as soon as possible.
rendezVous.warningVolVehiculePlaqueSansCreneau: No appointment slot is available in the next 24 hours. Your pre-complaint will be submitted without an appointment. Please go to a police station as soon as possible.
rendezVous.warningAutreVol: To process your complaint as effectively as possible, it is preferable to make an appointment as soon as possible.
